title: Baby Bio Pour & Feed Liquid Plant Food, 1L - Ready To Use Houseplant Food - with Seaweed Extract - to Stimulate Healthy Growth and Vibrant Flowering - Indoor Use Plant Nutrition
features: SEAWEED: Enriched with natural Seaweed extract to stimulate healthy growth
PLANT CARE ROUTINE: Include as part of your regular plant care routine for beautiful vibrant blooms and lush green leaves
EASY TO USE: Convenient pre-made solution makes it easy to apply, by simply pouring onto your garden and houseplants
PLANT NUTRITION: Balanced formula that ensures your plants get the nutrients they need to look their best
COMBINE: Pair with Baby Bio Bug Killer and Leaf Shine for the complete solution to caring for your houseplants
description: From the manufacturer SIMPLE & EFFECTIVE NUTRITION FOR HEALTHIER, VIBRANT HOUSEPLANTS QUICK & CONVENIENT Baby Bio Pour and Feed offers an effortless solution for feeding your houseplants. Its ready-to-use formulation eliminates the need for dilution, allowing you to simply pour it directly onto the compost. With a handy measuring cap, it ensures that your plants receive the perfect amount of feed, preventing the risks of under or overfeeding ENRICHED WITH SEAWEED Enriched with seaweed, Baby Bio Pour and Feed provides a balanced mix of nutrients that supports vibrant blooms, lush green leaves, and overall healthy growth. Perfect for houseplants, outdoor garden plants, pots, containers, and hanging baskets, this easy-to-use liquid feed helps plants grow quickly and thrive with minimal effort. UNIVERSAL SOLUTION Baby Bio has been feeding all houseplant types for over 70 years, from lush greens to delicate orchids, this unique fertiliser ensures balanced nutrition and lasting beauty.
